entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange providing AMM token swaps, liquidity pools, V2/V3 exchange surfaces, protocol analytics, pool and token views, and related liquidity products.
entity.notes: Current first-party website is reachable and the official IceCreamSwapCom frontend repository remains active. HEI consolidates Core, V2, V3, chain, and registry-source rows under one IceCreamSwap entity rather than splitting versions or deployments.

evidence.title: IceCreamSwap
evidence.notes: Current first-party IceCreamSwap website remains reachable as the live protocol surface.

evidence.title: IceCreamSwap Frontend
evidence.notes: First-party organization repository identifies the project as the IceCreamSwap frontend and contains the exchange website implementation, swap SDK packages, pools, token, volume, liquidity, transaction, and protocol information surfaces.

evidence.title: IceCreamSwap frontend update — token list sanitizing
evidence.notes: Recent first-party frontend commit demonstrates active maintenance of the IceCreamSwap trading frontend in July 2026.
